title: begonia laciniata subsp. flava
intro: Begonia laciniata subsp. flava, also known as the split-leaf begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Begonia laciniata subsp. flava include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves to make a powder or tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
